title: pykickstart  bug fix update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.32.15-1.0.2]
- Sync OL9 handler definitions with RHEL9
- Fixes bug where Kickstart reports ostreecontainer is an unknown command [Orabug: 38856710] [JIRA: OLDIS-50232]
full_text:
[3.32.15-1.0.2]
- Sync OL9 handler definitions with RHEL9
- Fixes bug where Kickstart reports ostreecontainer is an unknown command [Orabug: 38856710] [JIRA: OLDIS-50232]

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50063.html
